content.description: Edit video, image navigation, and news articles in one flow.

hero.description: Manage the hero slides, headings, menu, and social links.

articles.description: Edit the news article list and the news page background.

themeSettings.title: Theme Settings

blog.title: Public Blog Entry
blog.description: This page aggregates all published blog posts. Browse public posts first, then jump into each creator's blog page.
blog.emptyDescription: There are no published blog posts right now. Published posts will appear here automatically.

shop.title: Public Shop Entry
shop.description: This page aggregates all published products. Browse the public catalog first, then jump into each creator's shop and product detail pages.
shop.emptyDescription: There are no published products right now. Published products will appear here automatically.
